evals.prompt: Use $build-chatgpt-app with $openai-docs to scaffold a private ChatGPT app that searches and displays our product catalog with a React widget.
evals.expected_output: A docs-first archetype decision, search/fetch tool plan, MCP server and widget scaffold, CSP guidance, and local validation steps.

evals.prompt: Review this ChatGPT Apps SDK repository and identify why the widget fails to load after a tool call.
evals.expected_output: A repository-contract validation report with concrete MCP resource, metadata, URI, bridge, and CSP findings.
